reasoning: The control AU-3 focuses on the content of audit records, which is directly applicable to Kubernetes through its audit logging capabilities. Kubernetes provides audit logs that can be configured to capture detailed metadata about API requests, including who made the request, what was requested, and the response. Ensuring that audit logging is enabled, that it captures comprehensive metadata, and that logs are retained appropriately aligns with the requirements of AU-3.
title: Content of Audit Records
